# iPhone截图如何添加放大镜

---

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzkyNTg3NTUzMA==&mid=224748...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzkyNTg3NTUzMA==&mid=2247485957&idx=1&sn=a4c5a501772989cc180d861f968c177e&chksm=c3dc06de2fa0e5cfb5b84daddbce2c27ab1414a2424a2eb8c23e17eed981b0ba2e476a35e39c&scene=90&xtrack=1&req_id=1782304277226080&sessionid=1782304295&subscene=93&clicktime=1782306063&enterid=1782306063&flutter_pos=8&biz_enter_id=4&ranksessionid=1782305433&jumppath=20020_1782305947487,1104_1782305982583,20020_1782305994095,1104_1782306031837&jumppathdepth=4&ascene=56&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004b2b&nettype=WIFI&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=zvBI244NjRUK9J+hOwIiG/YolkMiXwem0B7zvAPj7zb5QKJ8pz41+vnImVrXS5Hl&wx_header=3)

![](.evernote-content/34780522-5CCC-433E-ADA9-1180BC96488A/0CEADF12-4F1F-404E-B91F-B8A77EF35064.png)![](.evernote-content/34780522-5CCC-433E-ADA9-1180BC96488A/72BAA400-3980-4BC5-9BCA-DADB7CB60529.png)![](.evernote-content/34780522-5CCC-433E-ADA9-1180BC96488A/D73EBC3F-0B94-42FC-AB48-60EE05A063C1.png)

如何添加放大镜

❶ 电源键+音量上截图，然后点击左下角预览图

❷ 点击那个笔头冲上的图标（右上角）

❸ 点击底部的“+”按钮，选择“添加放大镜”（可删描边）

• 绿色小球球转动放大倍率

• 蓝色小球球拖拽放大范围

• 可去掉描边

#iPhone

Close
